prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 100.8 kg; Height 176.7 cm; BMI 32.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 236mg/dL; 9 months ago 226mg/dL; 6 months ago 229mg/dL; 3 months ago 220mg/dL; current 186mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.9kg; 9 months ago 99.9kg; 6 months ago 99.9kg; 3 months ago 100.3kg; current 100.8kg), Height (12 months ago 176.7cm; 9 months ago 176.7cm; 6 months ago 176.7cm; 3 months ago 176.7cm; current 176.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 50mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 195mg/g; 9 months ago 218mg/g; 6 months ago 238mg/g; 3 months ago 183mg/g; current 226mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
